Alright guys, so now we're on to kind of the last step in today's workshop. Okay, we covered a lot of stuff so far We've covered talked about your dream client how to get the results for them initially and then from there What type of funnel you're gonna use and then from there funnel hacking other funds to find out what the offers and the price points and what that That process is gonna look like and then we went to click phones. We built it out So now you got all these pieces that are that are done the last step is how do I get? People now to come to this website and give me money right that's kind of the last step in the process and so There's been a lot said and taught about how to drive traffic and For me most of the ways that people teach how to drive traffic to website super technical super complicated. I'm not a big techie person I don't You know you guys have been here you see I tell a lot of stories That's kind of how my my world works and and traffic for me is a little bit different so I'm gonna explain to you guys how I look at traffic and I think if you understand that the principles I'm gonna kind of share with you It makes it where getting traffic becomes really really easy and that's kind of the goal because the traffic is the fuel You get the most amazing fun on the world with nobody's showing up No money's gonna come in right you can't serve anybody at that level But if you get people coming in then then it can grow really really quickly so The way that I look at traffic like says a little different and I learned this concept initially from a guy named chat homes and chat wrote a book called the ultimate sales machine and It's an amazing book you guys it's worth the 10 or 12 bucks on Amazon to get it But in that book he talks through a whole bunch of stuff But there's one chapter in there that really had a huge impact on on me and my company it was a chapter called the dream 100 and And what chat talked about here and the way that he uses dream 100 is different than the way that I use it But I want to explain how he did because it'll help you understand how we use it here Inside of our inside of our company so what Chet did just started working for a billionaires name is Charlie Munger and Chet ran one of his his magazine divisions and at the time I think that I can't remember exactly the number I think they're like number 15th out of 15th magazines like they were the worst in the entire in the entire industry and and Chet's job was to get advertisers advertised in their magazine and And at first you know for years people have been trying to get people to advertise and they were always struggling and and Chet came in and said well Who in our industry look I looked all the other newsletters like who were the Who are the advertisers spending the most amount of money? And he said I want to find out the top 100 advertisers in our market and so sat down and wrote down like this guy and this guy Figured out who the top 100 Advertisers were the potentially could be in their magazine, but weren't so he'd build out his dream 100 list Then he took that list and he started to relentlessly marketing to these people So he did is he would literally he'd send out something in the mail every week or he sent something in the mail And then two weeks later you call him on the phone Then two weeks later you're sending out something in the mail again And two weeks later you call him on the phone and he relentlessly did this to his dream 100 over and over and over again In the first month they got no clients second month. No or an advertiser second month no new advertised third month nothing nothing And after six months they finally got their first advertisers in Within a year they had like 20 or 30 of the top advertisers and and three years in a row doing nothing but this dream 100 concept Chet doubled Charlie Munger's this division's company three years in a row and he tells the story It's kind of funny said that Charlie Munger brought him afterwards It's like are you something illegal because it's not physically possible to double a company three years in a row And he's like no I just I did this dream 100 concept and so when I first heard this as like that's really really cool But I'm like, but I'm not really going after and for my company some of your companies you might be and if so then Fault the way Chet did but for me I wasn't trying to get to close one client at a time What I wanted is is I know that there are people out there that have my dream clients on their lists or they're reading their blogs You're listening to their podcast and they're out there and I started making dream 100s of people that have my target audience In their universe in their world, right? So like what what people have big email lists of my dream clients and I started mapping out my dream 100 list I started going through and started building it out and and so I kind of give you guys on the blueprint here I have a little exercise I might have you guys go through but I kind of break it down into four different categories my the first one I look for people who are list owners, okay in my market They mean who are the people their own lists? Okay, and if you don't know that it kind of comes back a whole funnel hacking thing you go out there and find out who your competitors By this the by their product subscribe the list see that stuff because you start seeing emails coming you find out Who are the actual list owners that are in your in your world? Okay, no one map out as many those people as possible second or the bloggers, okay in your in your sphere of influence The the market you want to be and I promise you they're bloggers talking about your topic Okay, and I'm gonna list out all the different bloggers that are that are my dream 100 because if I get well bloggers Right a blog post about my product boom sales and traffic and come almost instantly, right? Same thing with podcasts podcast like radio stations, okay? And a lot easier to get a hold of people that are on podcasts radio stations So who the top 10 or 15 or 20 different podcasters in my market and look at social media Who's got the biggest Facebook followings the biggest Twitter followings the biggest YouTube channels like I want to know exactly who those people are I build this dream 100 list of all my potential clients now I know for me looking back over the last 10 years is that There's no way I'm gonna get all dream 100 to go and promote my product like it's just not physically possible What is possible? Is to get a percentage if I get one or two or three people to do a deal with me Like I've had I've had partners who I worked on this for a year two years three years and finally they say yes to something And they'll make me a million dollars from one partnership And so it's important understand that each of these people are a real people and each one can be worth a lot of money And they can bring you tons of new clients and just bring new people into your world So that's it's kind of important So the first step in this is identifying that who are my dream 100? I need to have a list of all who those people are okay? So that's kind of the first step is building that out The second step in this process is really understanding like how can I like how can I get to know these people? How can I serve these people? How can I build a relationship? Okay, I was talking to Mike yesterday about this a little bit about business and when I was before I got into business I assume the business was all like you know math and techniques and tech stuff like that and the rallies it's not it's Relationships and so I built my dream 100 list. I knew that I wanted to get to know these people I got to figure out like I need them to know who I am I need to have a relationship if I'm gonna ask them to do stuff for me You can't just call someone about the boom bank. Hey, I've got this new product. You promote it He doesn't it doesn't work that way. I would say on average right now We probably get I'd say between 30 and 40 phone calls and emails a week from people contacting me asking to promote their products People I don't know who they are They all go to my gatekeeper and she just tells them all no and just they disappear because they don't have relationship with me But I tell you what the people have relationship with that they text me and they're like, hey What do you think like I'll respond to that because I have a relationship with them So my first step after I build out my dream 100 is like how can I like how can I build a relationship with these guys? I need to figure out I need them to know who I am I need to know that I'm providing value and I'm serving them because that's a big key and Sometimes it's kind of hard like if you're someone's got a huge list like how do you provide value that person if they've got these things And so there's different ways there's different ways to do it one strategy I'll kind of share really quick just really briefly that I recommend all you guys doing is Is starting your own podcast? I know that that might be scary for some of you guys but When you have your own podcast Think about it's like your own radio show it's simple to make you can make it in your house You can make it I have my podcast to make my car when I'm driving like it's a simple thing to do But a podcast is a platform for you Okay, and when you have a platform you can invite people to come to that platform and by doing that it provides value for them Okay, for example one of the one of the seasons of celebrity apprentice Our senior hall was was Was one of the the the guys he actually ends up winning celebrity prince that the year that he was in it But I remember like in the middle of the season there was there was a task was a fundraising task They needed everyone to go call all their rich buddies and try to raise money So everyone's out there calling people and getting tons of money and our senior hall seen on the couch calling person after person after person And didn't raise a single penny and he was so frustrated because he's like I have like I'm our senior hall I've got the biggest Rolex people in the world But nobody returned my call and the very end that he said this thing was so powerful He said when I had my own show everyone returned my call I thought like how how powerful how prolific is that? Okay when you have your own show everyone returns your call So all of a sudden I got my own podcast. I started even if I have zero subscribers I can start calling my dream 100 say I've got a cool podcast. It's called bubble bubble I love to interview interview you on here. You might say You know they might say no, but it might say sure I love to because what is it for them? It's a platform it's a platform to come and just share you have a chance to interact them interview them for half an hour An hour whatever it is and all of a sudden you provide a value you get on the platform You build the relationship and now I've infiltrated my dream 100 Okay, the the funnel hacking podcast the funnel hacker podcast we're launching It's one of the big strategies for me is you go out there and to penetrate all these different all these different people and build Relationships and a whole bunch of different markets like that's one of my things I want to penetrate my dream 100 deeper and deeper. Okay, so it's a really powerful strategy It's free to set up. It's easy to do so that's like one one idea on a way to to do that Okay, so that's one thing second thing that we do is that we built out our dream 100 I like to be in constant communication with them I want them to hear from me and to know who I am and so we do a lot of really cool things Some months I just send them gifts in the mail I guess send them a book or I might send them just random things just like just to be cool because people like cool people Right, so I send them random cool gifts another month. They're so busy. They don't care about yourself So I want to keep in front of them. So then this is the letter. And how do you how do you do that? And how do you you know like I want to start making money today? I don't want to wait six months or a year from now to have a relationship and And so I told him the story that I think will help you guys as well because I don't have again I don't have to get 100 people to love me. I just got to get one if I can get one cool kid to think I'm cool It'll penetrate this dream 100 and make you more money that you can ever dream of For example, we'll kind of illustrate this actually. Have any of you guys seen the movie never been kissed with Drew Barrymore? Only the one woman in the room to be on Chad. No, I never seen it Anyway, the premise of the movie Drew Barrymore goes to high school She's a super nerdy person all her friends called her Josie Grossie and she was like a loser, right? Graduates from high school becomes a reporter now She's like happy because she's out of high school and then her boss comes there says we need a story about What high school kids are doing nowadays? You're gonna go undercover and go back to high school And so she goes undercover goes back to high school and instantly she slips back into being a nerd and she's like She's like reporting back like well chess clubs doing this and did it and they're like these are stupid stories We want stories of the cool kids like you need to get into the cool kids And she's like it's not that easy again with the cool kids and then fast forward her brother who's being played by David Arquette He's like jealous because he was like a jock in high school and he's been a loser since then He's like I want to be back in high school so he enrolls in the high school to like slip in and like become cool again and and and she says to him something like like it's not that easy just to become just to like become cool He's like yeah, just check this out And then they're in this school cafeteria and they have these big tubs of coleslaw And he stands on the table this cut coleslaw and he's eaten an entire thing like down into his mouth and then tired like Cafeteria is cheering and screaming form he slams the coleslaw down and like instantly He's like the coolest kid in the whole thing right and then and then this is what the power is is after he's become become cool Then he starts going all his friends and say you see that girl Josie over there man We used to date but she broke up with me She's amazing and she told one or two cool kids and suddenly boom she was into the cool kids crowds Okay, now everyone in your market you guys I promise you there's some kind of good boy good old boys club Okay, in every market you want to be in then there and it's hard to penetrate it But after you penetrate it it becomes really easy now to infiltrate it. Okay, um, for example one of my buddies his name is Talman Knudson and He called I met him initially he called me probably Man eight or nine years ago called me up on the phone. He's like hey Russ. I got this idea I want you to promote it and he told me that I did and I thought it was the stupidest idea in the world I said nope, but thanks for calling I kind of hung up and then I didn't hear anything from for like three or four months And all of a sudden one day out of the blue I saw like 50 people all emailed to this thing that he had created And I was like what in the world I was looking to email off email all the stuff And I was like that's that weird tell me that called me I'm like I was looking at I was looking I'm like that was the idea you pitched on me like that idea was stupid Like why are people doing I was so confused and then I called me afterwards come like I just got to ask you like Because I totally shut you down. How'd you always people to say yes? He said you know what happened? He said I got on the phone. He's like I called the first person. They told me no called the second person He said no third person. No fourth person. It's like you told me know everyone told me no He said the 49th person I called the name is Kevin. He said I told Kevin and Kevin said that's pretty cool Man, I'm in he said soon as the first person said yes They said I called the next guy said have new this project Kevin's in do you want to be in as well? The second guy said yes, and third guy said yes at every person after that said yes And it just changed the whole paradigm and so for you guys I want you to think about like I'm building this listen I don't have to get everyone it's not I don't want to be this huge overwhelming task But I want you to have this as the target and and start building relationships because soon as you get into one person That person can issue to the next into the next and it starts opening up a whole world of opportunities Okay, so that's the next thing now the last thing I want to share with you guys is because a lot of times No matter how good you get at getting inside this dream 100 sometimes the people are never gonna promote for you Okay, for example, Tony Robbins been my dream 100 forever I've had a chance to speak it as a vans I've had a chance to hang out a bunch of times like I've done a bunch of things But I know that Tony will never email his list saying hey buy Russell Brunson stuff like it's probably not ever gonna happen Okay, but what's cool is that now? Facebook and other traffic sources more of them are coming on board I can go to Facebook comm I can see Tony's got whatever 1.5 million followers and because he's on my dream 100 I know that Facebook will allow me to go and say hey show my ad to all of Tony Robbins 1.5 million subscribers And instantly in their news feed they see my ad boom boom boom And so I start going through my dream 100 see who's got Facebook followings who's got Twitter followings Who's got a big YouTube channel, and I don't even have to ask those people if I don't want to okay These platforms will allow me to go and infiltrate these people immediately So if I can't get them to promote or even if I can't get them to promote I'm also going directly through the ad networks to all the cent target this guy's list and this guy's listen boom boom And start going through this whole thing and that's how we start driving traffic. Is that exciting you guys? So for me 100% it comes off of my dream 100 Okay, I'm not talking about keywords or all this other crap the most we'll talk about for traffic my my initial thing is boom Who is my dream 100?
